{{CargoClone
|name=Gallant Huang Gai
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=162
|gene1={race} HP +500
|gene2={race} TECH +50
|gene3=Each round, {race} HP +300
|gene4=Per 60 Mecha Minions in battle,
Troop Water DMG +6
|gene5=Lifesteal Effect +3%
|gene6=Per 60 Mecha Minions in battle,
Troop Water DMG +10
|gene7=Lifesteal Effect +5%
|}}
